subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the peerless Almighty Who, through His conquering power and all-encompassing will, hath brought forth countless creatures... O Mir, upon thee be the glory of God and His loving-kindness. Thy letters have repeatedly reached Us, and from them wafteth the sweet fragrance of steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش قادر بی مثالیرا سزاست که بقوت غالبه و اراده محیطه خلایق بیشمار … یا میر علیک بهآء الله و عنایته نامه‌های شما مکرر رسید و عرف استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
